title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Judge, Unknown person #14, Nami, Jinbe, Big Mom as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: AT SEA - BIG MOM'S SIDE

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Jinbe and Germa 66??

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that straw hat boy is still alive on cacao Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Y-Yes he's alive, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There's nowhere for him to run anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he's really still alive... then I'm going there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll steal his soul and use it to create powerful homes to serve me...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Mamama mama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We barely made it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Life isn't all bitter experiences after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we can escape without any trouble at our own pace...

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: I'm worried about Germa- rero...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shut it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami!! sail as fast as possible!! And as far away as possible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When a fishman becomes serious, they can change even sea currents.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Okay!! I under- stand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Amazing...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The sea is....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Seriously, you're just...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You're Under- Estimating > Us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wahaha haha... that isn't true, brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: EVERY- ONE HAS TO SURVIVE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that you can all send me off!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Jinbe is staying at the rear, and straw hat is making his escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They're preventing the fleet from moving....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to lose sight of the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You sound like you're on his side...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I am. Straw hat is a prime candidate, after all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Here's what I think, Stussy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Among those recently referred to as the worst generation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of them will rise to be the next pirate King!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 31 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
